title: Daumen Group
summary: The Daumen Group (German: Daumengruppe) is a mountain range of the Allgäu Alps, named after Großer Daumen, the highest mountain in the range.
text:
The Daumen Group (German: Daumengruppe) is a mountain range of the Allgäu Alps, named after Großer Daumen, the highest mountain in the range.

Geography
Major peaks include:

Großer Daumen - 2280 m
Schneck - 2268 m
Westlicher Wengenkopf - 2235 m
Nebelhorn - 2224 m
Östlicher Wengenkopf - 2206 m
Rotkopf - 2194 m
Laufbacher Eck - 2177 m
Himmelhorn - 2113 m
Lachenkopf - 2112 m
Schochen - 2100 m
Kleiner Seekopf - 2096 m
Salober - 2088 m
Großer Seekopf 2085 m
Gundkopf - 2062 m
Laufbichlkirche - 2044 m
Entschenkopf - 2043 m
Rotspitze - 2033 m
